ground_truth.title: Almondina, Toastees, Toasted Almond Thins, Cranberry Almond, 5.25 oz (149 g)
ground_truth.main_content:
By Almondina

Product code: ALD-00601
UPC: 722325006016
Package quantity: 148 g
Dimensions: 9.7 x 12.4 x 6.6 cm, 0.16 kg

Product overview

Low Fat
No Added Salt
No Preservatives
Dairy Free
Calories 120 | Protein 3 g | Cholesterol 0% - Per Serving
Baked Snack
Kosher Pareve
Baked in Small Batches
Made from Scratch

Our family created these delicious crunchy almond crisps for special occasions and get-togethers. It's a lighter version of grandma Dina's original secret family recipe. The crisps quickly became a highly requested snack item at the office, school events, on road trips and at parties.

Baked with simple ingredients found in most kitchens, these crisps contain no cholesterol, no dairy, no preservatives, no added fat and salt. Extremely snackable and crunchy, Almondina Toastees are perfect on their own or with toppings. Excellent when paired with cheeses, enjoy with coffee, superb in ice cream or yogurt and a great treat for children of all ages. Have a nice crunch!

Tamar & Jason - Next Generation of the Almondina Family

Nutrition Facts

Serving Size: 12 Pieces (29 g)
Servings Per Container: About 5

Calories: 120
Total Fat: 2 g (3%)
Saturated Fat: 0 g (0%)
Trans Fat: 0 g
Cholesterol: 0 mg (0%)
Sodium: 30 mg (1%)
Total Carbohydrate: 23.5 g (8%)
Dietary Fiber: <1 g (3%)
Total Sugars: 13 g
Incl. 11 g Added Sugars (22%)
Protein: 3 g
Vitamin D: 0 mcg (0%)
Calcium: 10 mg (2%)
Iron: 0.3 mg (2%)
Potassium: 50 mg (2%)

Ingredients

Flour (wheat flour, malted barley flour), cane sugar, egg whites, almonds, sweetened dried cranberries (cranberries, cane sugar, sunflower oil), natural flavors, baking powder (sodium acid pyrophosphate, sodium bicarbonate, corn starch, monocalcium phosphate).

Contains: Wheat, eggs and almonds.
Baked in a facility that uses coconut, pecans, hazelnuts, sesame and pistachios.
